tasks.title: SwiftData models, enums, and versioned ModelContainer schema factory
acceptance_criteria: All four @Model types compile with the exact field shapes from tech_specs interfaces-json
DigestItem.id is derived as "\(sourceID)-\(meetingID)-\(sectionIndex)", never array position, with a unit test proving stability across reordering
ProcessingStage/ChangeType/NotificationCadence are flat String Codable enums, no associated values
ModelContainerFactory exposes a single static func other lanes call to get a configured, versioned ModelContainer

tasks.title: DiffEngine pure diff function + fixture tests
acceptance_criteria: DiffEngine.diff(old:new:) has zero imports of SwiftData or Summarization
Fixture-based unit tests cover unchanged/added/removed spans across at least 5 realistic agenda-text pairs
Function is deterministic — same input always produces identical DiffSpan array

tasks.title: SummarizerService protocol + ExtractiveSummarizer deterministic implementation
acceptance_criteria: SummarizerService protocol matches tech_specs signature exactly
ExtractiveSummarizer never throws for well-formed input and requires no network/model access
Fixture tests confirm first-sentence/heading extraction on at least 5 sample section texts
FoundationModelsSummarizer is stubbed as a TODO-free placeholder conforming to the protocol, gated behind an availability check, not wired into ProcessingCoordinator yet

tasks.title: PDFExtractor + OCRExtractor + ExtractionResult
acceptance_criteria: PDFExtractor tries PDFKit text layer first, falls back to OCRExtractor per page with no text layer
Per-page OCR failures populate unreadablePageIndices rather than throwing for the whole document
Fixture tests cover one clean text-layer PDF and one scanned/image-only PDF

tasks.title: PDFFileStore on-disk storage
acceptance_criteria: save(data:) writes to Documents/PDFs/<uuid>.pdf and returns only the filename
No PDF binary ever passed into or stored via SwiftData
url(for:) round-trips correctly in a unit test

tasks.title: ProcessingCoordinator core pipeline wiring
acceptance_criteria: ProcessingCoordinator is a @ModelActor calling PDFExtractor -> SummarizerService -> DiffEngine in sequence
Intermediate stage ticks are written only to ProcessingStatusBoard, never to SwiftData
Final DigestItem/DiffRecord are committed to the model context only at ready/partial/failed terminal states

tasks.title: Launch-reconciliation pass
acceptance_criteria: App-launch reconciliation requeues any persisted non-terminal ProcessingStage found in SwiftData
Named integration test: kill mid-.summarizing, relaunch against the same store, assert the meeting gets requeued and reaches a terminal state

tasks.title: In-flight invocation guard
acceptance_criteria: Coordinator tracks in-flight meetingIDs and refuses/no-ops a second concurrent process() call for the same ID
Named test: two concurrent process(meetingID:) calls for the same ID result in exactly one pipeline run and one terminal DigestItem set, not duplicated records

tasks.title: ProcessingStatusBoard
acceptance_criteria: @MainActor @Observable, in-memory only, keyed by document id
update(id:stage:) is the only mutation path; views read via the published stages dictionary

tasks.title: DesignSystem tokens + nine components
acceptance_criteria: Colors/spacing/type/radius match the design-handoff token values exactly (hex codes, spacing scale, corner radii)
ChangeBadge covers all five ChangeType cases with the specified color+icon pairing
All tap targets are 44x44pt minimum
Every component supports Dynamic Type up to accessibility XXXL without truncating the change type

tasks.title: Onboarding feature
acceptance_criteria: Static bundled-directory list with search, manual-add fallback on no results
No true error state modeled (directory is bundled, never network-fetched)

tasks.title: Following feed feature
acceptance_criteria: Empty-before-follow, per-source skeleton loading, success grouped list, and a distinct quiet 'all caught up' state are all separately implemented (not collapsed into one empty state)
Built and testable against a mock ProcessingCoordinator/status board before T-006 merges

tasks.title: Source Detail feature
acceptance_criteria: visibleHistory truncates to current+1 meeting unless EntitlementStore says otherwise
Failed-sync shown as non-blocking amber/red label with manual retry

tasks.title: Digest Item Detail feature
acceptance_criteria: Named-stage loading, success = summary+diff, partial = summary+completeness flag+missing sections, failed = message+retry+direct PDF link
VoiceOver label folds change type + completeness into one announcement per design handoff

tasks.title: Add Source feature full wiring
acceptance_criteria: search/follow/importPDF match tech_specs signatures
follow() surfaces EntitlementError.sourceCapReached to the view to trigger PaywallView
Bad/unreadable PDF import produces the specific 'we couldn't read this file' error copy

tasks.title: Settings feature
acceptance_criteria: Diagnostics sub-state directly surfaces on-device Apple Intelligence/model availability rather than letting it fail silently elsewhere

tasks.title: EntitlementStore (StoreKit 2)
acceptance_criteria: Backed by Transaction.currentEntitlements, all three checks (canFollowAdditionalSource, canViewHistoryBeyondMostRecent, canEnableNotifications) work fully offline
Free tier: max 2 sources, current+1 history, no notifications; Plus: unlimited/full history/notifications
Each of the three gates has an independent .storekit-config-driven test

tasks.title: Jurisdiction directory content + loader
acceptance_criteria: Bundled JSON ships with a real, usable initial set of municipal council/school-board/planning-commission entries across multiple states, not a token 10-entry placeholder
Loader never touches the network
JurisdictionDirectoryEntry matches tech_specs signature

tasks.title: NotificationScheduler
acceptance_criteria: requestAuthorizationIfNeeded only called contextually after first source followed + cadence set, never at launch
schedule(for:) no-ops when EntitlementStore.canEnableNotifications is false

tasks.title: PaywallView + PaywallTrigger
acceptance_criteria: One sheet, one message, headline copy varies only by trigger (sourceCap/history/notifications)
Triggered contextually from AddSourceModel/SourceDetailModel/notification toggle, never at launch

tasks.title: PDF retention policy design + implementation
acceptance_criteria: Written policy doc committed alongside code covering the Plus-upgrade interaction explicitly
Eviction only occurs after confirming extracted text/digest already persisted in SwiftData
Plus-tier users never silently lose archived PDFs — either exempted from eviction or history access re-triggers fetch, decided and implemented, not left ambiguous

tasks.title: Schema migration smoke test
acceptance_criteria: A V2 schema fixture with one deliberately added trivial field
Test proves ModelContainer migrates an existing populated store to V2 without data loss

tasks.title: Accessibility and snapshot testing
acceptance_criteria: ImageRenderer-based snapshot test of DigestItemCard at accessibility XXXL passes with no truncated change-type badge
Amended gold badge contrast is measured against WCAG AA and either passes or the color token is adjusted

tasks.title: XCUITest smoke flows
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding -> follow a source -> 'all caught up' flow passes end to end
Add-source -> import a corrupt/unreadable PDF -> specific failure message flow passes end to end

tasks.title: Physical-device verification pass
acceptance_criteria: Manual checklist executed on a real device covering BGTaskScheduler background refresh and the real Foundation Models summarizer path
Explicitly documented as non-blocking for ship, with results recorded, not left unverified

tasks.title: App entry point and tab assembly
acceptance_criteria: Constructs ModelContainer via data_domain's factory function only, no ad hoc schema setup
Assembles the three-tab IA (Following/Explore-Add/Settings)
This file is single-owned; other lanes request changes rather than editing directly
